common.joinThousands: Join thousands of citizens helping to build a better city. Start reporting civic issues today.
common.footerDesc: A smart platform for reporting and tracking civic issues, empowering citizens to improve their city's infrastructure.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your reported issues.
dashboard.nearbyIssuesDesc: See what's reported in your area
dashboard.motto: Working together for a cleaner city
dashboard.noComplaintsDesc: You haven't reported any issues yet.

myComplaints.title: My Complaints
myComplaints.subtitle: Track the status of your reported civic issues.
myComplaints.notFoundDesc: Try adjusting your filters or report a new issue.

complaintDetails.supportDesc: Have questions about this report? Chat with our support team directly.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information and preferences.
profile.changePassDesc: Update your password to keep your account secure.
profile.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.

landing.heroTitle: FixMyCity – Smart Civic Issue Reporting Platform
landing.heroDesc: Report infrastructure issues in your city such as potholes, broken streetlights, garbage problems, or water leaks. Track the progress of your complaint and help keep your city clean.

report.title: Report Issue
report.desc: Upload photo and describe the problem.

track.title: Track Progress
track.desc: Monitor complaint lifecycle from submission to resolution.

city.title: City Action
city.desc: Authorities review and resolve the issue.

ai.title: AI-powered classification
ai.desc: Smart categorization of issues for faster routing.

tracking.title: Real-time tracking
tracking.desc: Live updates on your complaint status.

admin.title: Admin management
admin.desc: Powerful tools for city officials to manage tasks.

auth.signInDesc: Sign in to report and track civic issues
auth.createAccountDesc: Join us in making our city better

report.title: Report an Issue
report.desc: Provide details about the civic problem you've encountered.
report.mapPlaceholder: Click on map to select location
report.mapHint: Click anywhere on the map to set the precise location of the issue.
report.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail. Mention any specific hazards or urgency.
tips: Be specific about the location to help our team find it faster.
Clear photos help us assess the priority and required tools.
Mention if the issue is causing immediate danger.
report.termsHint: By submitting, you agree to our terms of service and confirm the information provided is accurate.

publicFeed.title: Public Feed
publicFeed.subtitle: Discover and support civic issues reported in your community.
publicFeed.locationHint: Enable location access for nearby sorting. Currently sorting by top voted.
publicFeed.noComplaints: No complaints found in the public feed yet. Be the first to report an issue!
